evidence: Each frame carries one load-bearing element: the retrieval card alone in frame 1, the growing bar and climbing score in frame 4, and the walk-home question card in frames 5-6, with the feature bars serving as supporting context.
Frame 3 shows three labeled feature comparisons plus one dial readout, which read as a single comparison-table-plus-meter structure rather than five independent novel ideas.
Labels sit directly on their objects: 'you'/'the role' beside the bars, 'Python hours'/'SQL reps'/'nights free' above each pair, 'fit score' under the dial, with no boxed legend.
The 'Keep the direction. Drop the size. How?' text in frames 5-6 sits on the card directly above two visible vector arrows it annotates, and 'direction fixed' labels the held-still bar in frame 4.
All text — bar labels, numeric readouts, dial score '137', and the closing card question — is well above the ~2.2% frame-height threshold and clearly readable.
Every focal element sits inside the frame with margin; the '3 ways below' chip and its arrow in frames 5-6 stay fully within the lower-right area.
The numeric readouts sit on or immediately beside their bars in frame 4 without rendering any element illegible, and no unrelated text elements intersect.
The candidate bars stay in the periwinkle blue family (observed features) while the dial and its climbing score are lilac (the parameter/readout), consistent across frames 2-4.
No mascots, ornaments, or filler; the dial, bars, arrows, and cards all carry propositional roles.

The retrieval card holds while the meter idles, the columns swap for 'you'/'the role' across three labeled features that pool into the lilac dial, one bar stretches longer with a climbing score and 'direction fixed', and the walk-home card plus extensions chip close the beat.
Annotations touch their referents: 'direction fixed' beside the held bar, numeric scores beside their bars, and 'fit score' under the dial.
The sequence builds in reasoning order across frames — card, then bars, then numbers and dial, then the grown bar and score — reading as a continuous morph rather than cuts.
The compositions keep clear margins and a top-to-bottom, left-to-right reading order, with the closing card centered and well-spaced.
